_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: Minecraft Legacy Console Edition
author: lcdactyl@zephelinn.github.com
description: Minecraft Legacy Console Edition (TU19/v1.6.0560.0) server running via Wine. Uses the MinecraftConsoles project (https://github.com/smartcmd/MinecraftConsoles) with the -server flag for headless dedicated server support.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
mkdir -p /mnt/server
cd /mnt/server
apt-get install -y curl jq unzip
RELEASE_TAG="${RELEASE_TAG:-nightly}"
REPO="smartcmd/MinecraftConsoles"
echo "Installing Minecraft Legacy Console Edition Server"
RELEASE_JSON=$(curl -sSL "https://api.github.com/repos/${REPO}/releases/tags/${RELEASE_TAG}")
DOWNLOAD_URL=$(echo "${RELEASE_JSON}" | jq -r '.assets[] | select(.name | endswith(".zip")) | .browser_download_url' | head -n 1)
if [ -z "${DOWNLOAD_URL}" ] || [ "${DOWNLOAD_URL}" = "null" ]; then
    echo "ERROR: Could not find release ${RELEASE_TAG}."
    exit 1
fi
ZIP_NAME=$(basename "${DOWNLOAD_URL}")
curl -sSLo "${ZIP_NAME}" "${DOWNLOAD_URL}"
unzip -o "${ZIP_NAME}" -d .
rm -f "${ZIP_NAME}"
SUBDIR=$(find . -maxdepth 1 -type d ! -name '.' | head -n 1)
if [ -n "${SUBDIR}" ] && [ -f "${SUBDIR}/Minecraft.Client.exe" ]; then
    mv "${SUBDIR}"/* .
    rmdir "${SUBDIR}" 2>/dev/null || true
fi
if [ ! -f "Minecraft.Client.exe" ]; then
    echo "ERROR: Minecraft.Client.exe not found."
    exit 1
fi
if [ ! -f "server.properties" ]; then
    printf 'server-ip=\nserver-port=25565\nmax-players=8\n' > server.properties
fi
echo "Installation complete!"

variables.name: Max Players
variables.description: Maximum number of players allowed on the server (1-8).

variables.name: Extra Launch Flags
variables.description: Additional flags passed to Minecraft.Client.exe. Leave blank for none.

variables.name: Release Tag
variables.description: GitHub release tag to download during installation. Use nightly for the latest build.
